metadata.title: Board Subjects — Gujarat-scoped
metadata.scope: Gujarat schools — CBSE / GSEB English-Medium / GSEB Gujarati-Medium only
notes: All foreign and other regional languages dropped (Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Bengali, Odia, Kannada, Malayalam, Punjabi, Urdu, Arabic, Persian, Prakrit, French, German, Spanish, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Tibetan, Mizo, Nepali, Manipuri, Bahasa Melayu, Assamese, Sindhi).
ICSE / IB removed — out of scope.
Roles: first_language | second_language | third_language | core | elective | co_curricular.
elective_group_key: when present, students pick one item per group (e.g. 'g9_third_lang' for Hindi vs Sanskrit).
default_periods is a hint; actual class period is overridable per tenant.
